name: promptwise
description: PromptWise — the governance & intelligence layer for AI agents. Role-aware prompting, model routing, cost/budget control, security & compliance scanning, responsible-AI advisories, workflow planning, a governed agile method (agile personas, quality gates, policy-as-code, hash-chained audit trail), runtime enforcement hooks that auto-run security/policy/audit checks and can block, a continuous learning loop, diagrams, task tracking, and 80 portable skill packs. Rides the open standards (MCP · SKILL.md · AGENTS.md) instead of replacing your agent.
